description: Solicits Colosseum projects publicly and gives direct reply feedback. Quotes external advice (Dave Hsu) heavily.

main_solicitation_post.content: @Solana x @Colosseum Frontier applicants…. you know the drill :)

key_feedback_replies.reply: Hitting bit close to home… bullish on founders actively seeking feedback. Public list = /projects tab in Arena app.
Advice on pitch strategy: strong pitch + GitHub team page wins initial attention.
Would need market research… may be good enough to just add a swap… pls DM.
You are a founder — you shouldn’t ask for permissions. Just ship / fire away here or in DMs.

external_advice_he_quotes: Dave Hsu’s Notion doc on team/market/product/distribution + 'brag with context' (Alliance style).
overall_judging_style: Builder-friendly insider. Rewards feedback-seeking, shipping, bragging with context, market research, and traction. Practical + encouraging tone.
